title: Playtime
description: Whats the time? Playtime! Adds items and blocks and mobs from the poppy playtime game series for forge and fabric!
body:
Whats the time? Playtime!
This mod currently adds:

- The Grabpack (Hands work, doesnt fire yet.)
- Hand scanner
- Critter plushies

Planned features / blocks / entities:

- Working grabpack with redstone support
- Huggy, Mommy, Catnap, Doey, Dr sawyer, Yarnaby, Lily, The prototype and more!
- Nightmare critter plushies
- Hot-swap hands (Different hands for different tasks that blend into minecraft)
- Hostile and friendly Critters to fight or tame
- Purple hand-pads
- Grabpack grappling
- Decorative blocks like floor tiles
- Much, Much, MUCH more
